title: hieracium levicaule subsp. levicaule
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. levicaule, also known as small hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family, with yellow flowers and a rosette of leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium levicaule subsp. levicaule include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
